title: Unicorns Journal profiles Ron Zabel on the making of Cryptool
content_html:
Unicorns Journal has published a long-form interview with Cryptool CEO Ron Zabel.

The piece traces Ron's path through traditional and decentralised finance, the inefficiencies in both that pushed him to start Cryptool, and the thinking behind a single platform that covers asset management and fund administration for retail and professional investors alike.

It is one of the more detailed accounts of the company so far. The full interview is up on unicorns.club.
author: Cryptool
